label: View from Monte San Salvatore
description: A high-altitude panoramic view overlooking Lake Lugano and the Melide causeway, taken from a viewing platform on Monte San Salvatore.
search_prompt: high-angle panoramic shot of Lake Lugano featuring the Melide causeway and surrounding mountains from a lookout with a black metal railing

label: Yellow tourist photo frame
description: A large, tilted yellow rectangular frame used as a souvenir photo spot for tourists at a scenic viewpoint.
search_prompt: large tilted yellow metal picture frame at a mountain overlook

label: Monte San Salvatore Funicular Station
description: The base station of the funicular railway leading to Monte San Salvatore, a traditional building adorned with numerous international flags and distinctive red shutters.
search_prompt: chalet-style building with white lower walls, dark wood upper level, red shutters, and many international flags hanging from the facade

label: Plated meat and vegetable dishes
description: These images depict various restaurant-style meals featuring cooked meats like steak, ribs, or roast beef, accompanied by side dishes of roasted or steamed vegetables.
search_prompt: a plate of food featuring sliced cooked meat and assorted vegetables like potatoes, zucchini, or carrots

label: Via Ferrata San Salvatore
description: Climbers navigating a steep rock face equipped with fixed steel cables and metal rungs on a mountain route near Lugano.
search_prompt: person in climbing gear on a via ferrata with steel cables and iron rungs

label: Orientation map overlooking Lake Lugano
description: A vintage 1902 semi-circular orientation plaque showing a topographic map of the region, positioned at a high viewpoint overlooking the Melide causeway on Lake Lugano.
search_prompt: semi-circular orientation table with text 'Pro Lugano' in front of a panoramic lake and mountain view

label: Handwritten chalkboard restaurant menus
description: A collection of black chalkboard menus from a local restaurant, featuring various dishes and prices handwritten in vibrant, multi-colored chalk.
search_prompt: black chalkboard menu with colorful handwritten text in Italian

label: Monte San Salvatore travel poster
description: An outdoor information board showcasing a 1939 vintage travel poster for the Monte San Salvatore funicular in Lugano, Switzerland.
search_prompt: blue information sign with vintage Monte San Salvatore mountain poster

label: Monte Brè transmitter tower
description: A tall metal lattice telecommunications tower with a distinctive red and white top, situated on the summit of Monte Brè overlooking Lake Lugano.
search_prompt: tall lattice telecommunications tower with red and white tip on a mountain peak

label: Monte San Salvatore Funicular
description: A red funicular railway transporting passengers to the summit of Monte San Salvatore. It offers iconic views of the city of Lugano and its lake.
search_prompt: red funicular car climbing a steep track overlooking Lake Lugano

label: Church of San Salvatore summit
description: A small stone chapel with a gabled roof and a stone portico located at the peak of Monte San Salvatore in Lugano. It features a cross on its roof and the Latin inscription 'SALVATORI DICATVM' above the entrance.
search_prompt: small stone church with a gabled roof, a cross on top, and an arched portico entrance

label: Hellebore flowers in bloom
description: These images show close-up and group views of Hellebore flowers, commonly known as Christmas roses, featuring their characteristic white or pink petals and prominent yellow stamens. They are a signature early-spring bloom in European parks like Parco Ciani.
search_prompt: hellebore flower with yellow stamens and palmate leaves
